name: Centuria Capital Group
analysis: CNI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.0200. Trade idea: entry A$2.1900, stop A$1.7374, target A$3.5477 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
